implemented: Background audio best-effort retained/enhanced with Service Worker, AudioContext, and MediaSession.
Options watermark/placeholder and visible TTS voice mapping removed.
Wortart filter auto-closes options and starts playback.
Visible Unit labels changed to Einheit.
Frontend posts to /api/report-problem; recipient email is not in frontend/UI.
Node/Vercel server-side endpoint included in api/report-problem.js.
important_limitations: GitHub Pages alone cannot send email because it cannot run server-side endpoints. Deploy the included api/report-problem.js on Vercel/Node or adapt it to your backend.
The email address exists only in the backend endpoint file, not in frontend UI.
Mobile web/PWA background TTS remains best-effort. Guaranteed screen-off playback needs native background audio or bundled/backend audio.
